Name: Mind Body Sound Healing Collective
Modality: Sound baths, mindfulness, music therapy, health coaching
Notes: Bay-Area-wide service rather than SF-specific; blends neuroscience, mindfulness, the Safe & Sound Protocol; also offers corporate wellness programs; 5.0 rating (5 reviews)
